commands.review_summary:
The PR restores Gmail watcher `--exclude-labels`, adds `hooks.gmail.excludeLabels` config/runtime support, updates generated config docs, and adds focused Gmail hook tests.

PR surface: Source +16, Tests +72, Docs +2, Generated +14. Total +104 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. current main source shows `buildGogWatchServeArgs` does not append `--exclude-labels`, and both gateway auto-start and manual Gmail service use that helper. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human/contributor action: refresh or replace the dirty branch and add real Gmail watcher proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's real-environment proof.

target.title: fix(hooks): restore --exclude-labels in Gmail watcher args
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #56635

- Restores `--exclude-labels SPAM,TRASH,DRAFT,SENT` in `gog gmail watch serve` args so sent mail and draft saves do not trigger Gmail hook runs by default.
- Adds `hooks.gmail.excludeLabels` to the config schema/types with runtime default resolution and hook override support.
- Updates the sanitized log-args expectation so `--exclude-labels` appears in non-secret watcher logs.
- Regenerates the base config schema and docs baseline hash, and documents the default excluded label set.

AI-assisted: yes (Codex). I reviewed the diff and verified the behavior locally.

<details>
<summary>Before</summary>

Source-level reproduction on current `upstream/main` before the fix:

```text
base commit: 83753535eba457171f9c31c0b271764c5d59eacc
default gateway port: 18789
[
  "gmail",
  "watch",
  "serve",
  "--account",
  "openclaw@gmail.com",
  "--bind",
  "127.0.0.1",
  "--port",
  "8788",
  "--path",
  "/gmail-pubsub",
  "--include-body",
  "--max-bytes",
  "20000"
]
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>After</summary>

Same source-level reproduction on this PR branch after the fix:

```text
base commit: 83753535eba457171f9c31c0b271764c5d59eacc
default gateway port: 18789
[
  "gmail",
  "watch",
  "serve",
  "--account",
  "openclaw@gmail.com",
  "--bind",
  "127.0.0.1",
  "--port",
  "8788",
  "--path",
  "/gmail-pubsub",
  "--include-body",
  "--exclude-labels",
  "SPAM,TRASH,DRAFT,SENT",
  "--max-bytes",
  "20000"
]
```

</details>

<details>
